creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #3)
> I'm thinking not requiring the 'r' prefix is/was likely intended
Well, regardless of whether it was intended or not, it's obviously very fragile, ergo such request should have been denied, and current regexp should be fixed now so SVN revisions must always start with lowercase `r' to be interpreted as such.
